framework.name: Fraud Detection Systems Must Be Retrained for Good Bots
framework.description: Current fraud detection engines are tuned to flag non-human patterns as threats. Enabling legitimate agent payments requires retraining these systems to differentiate 'good bots' from malicious ones, possibly through whitelisting or registering trusted agents. This is non-trivial and requires new behavioral models.
framework.raw_quote: If we want certain bots (our agents) to transact, those systems need to be retrained to differentiate 'good bots' from malicious ones. This is non-trivial – it requires new behavioral models and possibly whitelisting or registering trusted agents.

source.title: Enabling Autonomous AI Agents to Make Payments - LinkedIn
